scripts.install:all: cd webrtc-backend && npm install && cd ../webrtc-frontend && npm install
scripts.start: start "" cmd /c "cd /d webrtc-backend && npm start" && start "" cmd /c "cd /d webrtc-frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.dev: start "Backend" cmd /c "cd /d webrtc-backend && npm start" && start "Frontend" cmd /c "cd /d webrtc-frontend && npm run dev"
